commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a module-level Feishu startup bot-identity probe queue plus regression tests for concurrent serialization, failure isolation, and abort behavior.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: configure multiple Feishu accounts and start the Feishu channel through gateway startup; current main can run up to four account start tasks concurrently, and each accountId path fetches bot identity directly without a shared queue. Live Feishu credentials are still needed to re-exercise the external vendor timeout itself.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor real-behavior proof plus rebase/re-review; automation should not replace the branch because the missing proof must come from a real Feishu setup and related startup policy needs maintainer reconciliation.

target.title: fix(feishu): serialise startup bot-info probes across concurrent accounts
